title: Using a KMS provider for data encryption — KMS v1
text:
Kubernetes version 1.10.0 or later is required
For version 1.29 and later, the v1 implementation of KMS is disabled by default.
To enable the feature, set
--feature-gates=KMSv1=true
to configure a KMS v1 provider.
Your cluster must use etcd v3 or later
